[[File:Kamil chathead.png|left]]
'''Kamil''' is one of the guardians of the [[Diamonds of Azzanadra]] fought during [[Desert Treasure I]]. He is often considered the hardest of the four bosses, due to his use of [[ice spells]] and the [[Chill|freezing environment]] he resides in.

Kamil makes a reappearance in the [[Recipe for Disaster]] final battle as [[Karamel]]. He can also be fought again in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete.

==Location==
[[File:Ice Path map.png|341x341px|thumb|left]]
Kamil is found on the [[Ice Path]] north of [[Trollheim]]. The easiest way to get there is by [[Trollheim Teleport]], which requires 61 [[Magic]] and completion of [[Eadgar's Ruse]]). Players will have to squeeze between the gate and kill five [[ice troll]]s to get the western cave to open. After entering the cave, players must head up the Ice Path, past the [[ice wolf|ice wolves]], until they reach a clearing. Kamil will appear when the player walks past the central boulder.

==Strategy==
[[File:Kamil fight.png|thumb|Fighting the warrior of ice.|right]]
Kamil attacks with both [[magic]] and [[melee]]. His magic attack is weak but accurate, encasing the player in ice for a short time and preventing eating or teleporting. His melee attack is much stronger, so it is advised to use [[Protect from Melee]], and wear armour that defends well against [[Magic]] while fighting him. Players should also bring good [[food]] to heal from the repeated magic damage, as well as [[super restore]]s to counter the freezing environment and restore [[Prayer]]. 

If Kamil is not in melee range, he will use his magic attack very often, effectively keeping the player stunned for the majority of the fight. Therefore, players with [[Protect from Melee]] should stay in melee range while fighting him, regardless of which attack style they are using.

Kamil is weak to [[fire spells]], but is immune to all other magic damage and effects, including [[Iban Blast]], [[powered staves]], [[Flames of Zamorak]], [[bind]], [[snare]], and [[entangle]]. Players using magic are advised to use a fire spell that is well below their current Magic level, as otherwise, they will constantly need to drink restore potions to keep casting. Players who have completed [[Family Crest]] will find the [[chaos gauntlets]] useful here, as the gauntlets raise the max hit of [[Fire Bolt]] to 15.

Ranged is also effective against Kamil. Additionally, Kamil is also considered an [[ice warrior]] in regards to [[Slayer task]]s; if the player has ice warriors as their current task, a [[Black mask (i)]] or equivalent would provide a damage bonus against him, making melee more viable.
